import { boxed, type Box } from "./box.js";

/*
 * These are parser bait, not program facts:
 * import { phantom } from "./phantom.js";
 * function phantomFunction<T>(value: T): T { return value; }
 * phantomReceiver.phantomCall(`ignored ${nested}`);
 */

export type Deep<T extends Record<string, unknown>> = Promise<ReadonlyArray<{
    [K in keyof T]: `${Extract<K, string>}:${T[K] extends string ? T[K] : never}`;
}>>;

export class Vessel {
    public constructor(public readonly name: string) {}

    public sail(distance: number): string {
        return `${this.name}:${String(distance)}`;
    }
}

export function identity<T>(value: T): T {
    return value;
}

export const tuple = <const T extends readonly unknown[]>(...items: T): T => items;

export function exerciseCalls(): string {
    const localBox = boxed({ id: 42 as const });
    const localVessel = new Vessel("local");
    const inferredLocal = localBox.get();
    return localVessel.sail(identity(tuple(inferredLocal.id).length));
}

const typedBox: Box<{ readonly id: 42 }> = boxed({ id: 42 as const });
const vessel = new Vessel("TypeSea");
const nestedParentheses = (((value: number): number => ((value + 1))))(1);
const methodResult = vessel.sail(identity(tuple(1, 2).length));
const templateResult = `literal phantomReceiver.phantomCall() ${((): string => {
    const braces = /[{}()]/u;
    return `inner ${braces.test("}") ? vessel.sail(nestedParentheses) : "no"}`;
})()}`;
const maybe: { readonly value: number } | undefined = { value: 1 };
const postfixValue = maybe!.value;

declare const input: { readonly value: number } | undefined;
const ocean = "🌊"; const target = input!.value;

export const inferred = typedBox.get();
export const evidence = {
    methodResult,
    ocean,
    postfixValue,
    target,
    templateResult
} satisfies Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>;
